name: Loft Golf Studios
address: 2 W Alameda Dr Suite #3, Tempe, AZ 85282
about: Loft Golf Studios provides a private indoor golf simulator experience available 24/7 by appointment. The facility operates on a membership-free model, offering access without a monthly commitment. Customers can rent a private bay by the hour to play virtual golf courses or practice their swing using simulator technology that provides instant feedback on each shot. Prepaid hour cards are available for discounted rates. The venue is located in Tempe, AZ.
why_golfers_like_it: GSPro software for realistic course simulation
Immediate swing feedback with high-speed video replay

food_and_drink.notes: Customers are welcome to bring their own food and beverages.
Customers are welcome to bring their own beverages.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs, as you are hitting real golf balls.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring in your own food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average is 1-hour per player to complete 18 holes. They recommend scheduling 2 hours for your initial round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically market itself as kid-friendly, and its model of a private, technology-focused simulator experience is geared more towards adults.
